creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Let's transition our efforts to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=284617, which is about switching the default Samba version to 4.20.

I'm marking this issue as blocking the transition to 4.20 for now. Let's see if the blockers for 4.19 also apply to 4.20 and move them over to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=284617 as needed.
